Drive more slowly and work from home to help ease energy crisis, IEA urgesPeople should change how they travel, work and cook to tackle the energy price crisis, the International Energy Agency says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg4540d0g4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg4540d0g4o#0 Fri, 20 Mar 2026 13:58:50 GMT
